title: Communauté de communes du Val d'Orne
summary: The Communauté de communes Val d'Orne is a federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Orne département and in the Normandy région of France. Its seat is Putanges-le-Lac. Its area is 254.4 km2, and its population in 2019 was 5,652. It covers some of the Communes that make up the area known as Suisse Normande.
text:
The Communauté de communes Val d'Orne is a federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Orne département and in the Normandy région of France. Its seat is Putanges-le-Lac. Its area is 254.4 km2, and its population in 2019 was 5,652. It covers some of the Communes that make up the area known as Suisse Normande.

Composition
The communauté de communes consists of the following 17 communes:
